name: naga-trinity-control
description: Electron controller for Razer Naga Trinity profiles, DPI and RGB.

scripts.dev: npm run build:electron && concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron ."
scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && npm run build:electron
scripts.build:electron: rm -rf dist-electron && mkdir -p dist-electron && esbuild electron/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --external:electron --external:usb --outfile=dist-electron/main.cjs && esbuild electron/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --external:electron --outfile=dist-electron/preload.cjs
